step_rationale: Glycoprotein inflammation marker; reflects systemic inflammatory status in plaque destabilization.
mechanism: GlycA is a glycoprotein-bound inflammation marker that correlates with monocyte recruitment and plaque destabilization in Type 1 MI pathogenesis.

references.title: Greater alterations in atherogenic lipids and inflammatory markers in women during type 2 diabetes development and risk of coronary heart disease-Findings from two population-based studies.
Early life infection and proinflammatory, atherogenic metabolomic and lipidomic profiles in infancy: a population-based cohort study.
Lipids, Lipoproteins, and Metabolites and Risk of Myocardial Infarction and Stroke.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
